chunks.text:
Customer Service Knowledge Base
Production RAG Knowledge Document | | April 2026
Customer Operations & Policy Management Division
14 Major Sections 100+ Policy Rules Prime vs Standard All Edge Cases
Membership Tiers Returns & Refunds Shipping & Delivery Damage Claims
Inventory Mgmt Payment & Billing Fraud Prevention Escalation SLAs

1.1 ShopNow Standard Membership
Standard membership is the default free tier available to all registered customers. Standard members have access to the full product
catalogue and checkout but receive baseline service levels without priority benefits.
Feature Standard Entitlement
Delivery speed 5–7 business days standard, 2–3 days express (paid)
Customer support Email within 48 hours, live chat queue (no priority)
Return window 15 days from delivery confirmation
Free returns First return per order free; subsequent returns: $3.99 label fee
Price match Not eligible
Early access sales Not eligible
Wishlist / saved items Up to 50 items
Order history retention 12 months
1.2 ShopNow Prime Membership
Prime membership is a paid subscription tier at $14.99/month or $139/year (saving $40.88 annually). Prime members receive
elevated service across every dimension of the shopping experience.
Feature Prime Entitlement
Delivery speed Free 2-day delivery on 5M+ eligible items; same-day in 40+ metros
Customer support Dedicated Prime line — wait time under 2 min; 24/7 availability
Return window 30 days from delivery; extended to 60 days November–January
Free returns Unlimited free returns on all Prime-eligible orders
Price match Guaranteed lowest price + 5% additional credit if lower found within 7 days
Early access sales 48-hour head start on all flash sales and new product launches

Early access sales 48-hour head start on all flash sales and new product launches
Exclusive deals Prime-only discounts averaging 18% deeper than standard price
Wishlist / saved items Unlimited
Order history retention 5 years with downloadable export
Prime Video + Music Included at no extra cost
Family sharing Up to 5 household members share Prime benefits (separate accounts)
Prime Try Before You Buy Order up to 6 items, 7-day trial, pay only for what you keep
Agent Note: Always verify membership tier before quoting delivery timelines, return windows, or support SLAs. Use the account
dashboard Membership tab. If a customer disputes their tier, verify the billing history — lapsed Prime members revert to Standard the
day after expiry.
1.3 Prime Trial, Upgrade & Downgrade Rules
Free Trial: New customers receive a 30-day Prime trial. Trial members receive full Prime benefits. Trial automatically converts to paid
subscription on Day 31 unless cancelled. Cancellation during trial: no charge, immediate reversion to Standard.

Upgrading Standard to Prime: Instant benefit activation upon payment. Prorated credit is NOT applied to existing pending orders —
delivery and return terms remain as quoted at checkout.
Downgrading Prime to Standard: Benefits continue until the current billing cycle ends. Outstanding Prime Try Before You Buy items
must be returned or purchased before downgrade. Customers may not reinstate a trial after prior trial use.

2.1 Support Channels & SLA by Tier
Channel Standard SLA Prime SLA
Live Chat Standard: queue, avg 12 min Prime: priority queue, avg 90 sec
Phone Standard: not available Prime: dedicated line, avg 90 sec
Email Standard: 48-hour response Prime: 12-hour response
Callback Standard: not available Prime: within 30 minutes
Social Media DM Both: 24-hour response Prime: 4-hour response
In-App Chat Bot Both: 24/7 instant tier 1 Prime: escalation in 60 sec
After-hours Bot only Prime: 24/7 live agent
2.2 Escalation Tiers
Tier Agent Level Scope Target Resolution Ownership
Automated bot /
Tier 1 Password reset, order status, tracking Instant Bot
self-service
Tier 2 Frontline agent Returns, cancellations, basic billing 5 min (Prime) / 15 min (Std) Agent
Disputed charges, account suspension,
Tier 3 Senior specialist Same day Specialist
fraud
Legal threats, regulatory complaints,
Tier 4 Team lead / manager 4 hours Lead
media
Tier 5 Executive escalation Class actions, government inquiries 2 hours VP+
2.3 Contact Resolution Standards
Every customer interaction must result in one of three documented outcomes: (1) Issue fully resolved, (2) Escalation created with
reference number provided to customer, or (3) Pending action documented with expected resolution date communicated. Agents must
never close a ticket marked 'pending' without first setting an automated follow-up reminder within 24 hours.

never close a ticket marked 'pending' without first setting an automated follow-up reminder within 24 hours.
First Contact Resolution (FCR) targets: Tier 2 agents: 78% FCR. Tier 3 specialists: 92% FCR. Prime customers: 85% FCR
minimum. Failure to meet FCR triggers supervisor review.

3.1 Order Lifecycle States
Order State Description
Pending Payment Order created, payment not yet captured
Payment Confirmed Payment captured; order enters fulfilment queue
Picking Warehouse team assigned; items being located
Packing Items packed; weight and dimensions confirmed
Awaiting Dispatch Ready for carrier pickup
Dispatched Handed to carrier; tracking number activated
In Transit Carrier has package; tracking updates every 4 hours
Out for Delivery Last-mile delivery in progress; SMS/push alert sent
Delivered Carrier marked delivered; 48-hour window to report issues
Completed 48 hours post-delivery with no issues raised
Cancelled Order cancelled pre-dispatch; refund initiated within 1 hour
Return Initiated Customer raised return; label issued
Return in Transit Carrier has return package
Return Received Warehouse confirmed receipt of return
Refunded Refund processed to original payment method
3.2 Order Modification & Cancellation
Cancellation window: Orders may be cancelled at no charge within 30 minutes of placement (Payment Confirmed state). After 30
minutes, the order enters the picking queue and cancellation is not guaranteed.
Address changes: Allowed within 30 minutes of placement via self-service. After 30 minutes, contact support — possible only if order
has not reached 'Packing' state. Prime members receive priority address-change processing.

has not reached 'Packing' state. Prime members receive priority address-change processing.
Item quantity changes: Not supported post-confirmation. Customer must cancel and re-order, or add a separate order. Partial
cancellations within a multi-item order are allowed pre-picking.
3.3 Payment Methods Accepted
Payment Method Details
Credit / Debit Cards Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover — all regions
ShopNow Wallet Prepaid balance; earns 1.5% cashback on every purchase
Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) Affirm, Klarna, Afterpay — orders $50–$3,000
Gift Cards Digital and physical; stackable up to 10 per order
PayPal / Venmo Supported; no additional fee
Apple Pay / Google Pay Supported on mobile app and Safari/Chrome browsers
Cryptocurrency Bitcoin and Ethereum accepted; rate locked at checkout
Bank Transfer (ACH) Orders >$500; 1–2 business day processing delay
Corporate Invoice Business accounts only; Net-30 terms; $5,000 minimum

4.1 Delivery Speed Options
Option Eligibility Cutoff ETA Cost
Order by 12:00 PM
Same-Day Delivery Prime only By 9:00 PM same day $0 (Prime) / $12.99
local
Next-Day Delivery Prime + Standard (paid) Order by 11:59 PM Next business day $0 (Prime) / $9.99
2-Day Delivery Prime eligible items Any time 2 business days $0 (Prime) / $7.99
Standard 5–7 Day All customers Any time 5–7 business days $0 (orders>$35) / $4.99
Economy 7–14 Day All customers Any time 7–14 business days $0 (always free)
International 70+ countries Any time 7–21 business days Calculated at checkout
Scheduled Delivery All customers 48h advance booking Customer-chosen slot $3.99 surcharge
4.2 Carrier Partners & Tracking
ShopNow partners with multiple carriers to optimise cost and speed. Carrier selection is automatic based on package dimensions,
destination, and customer tier. Customers do not select the carrier at checkout.
Carrier Use Case Tracking Frequency
UPS Domestic parcels; signature required >$200 Real-time
FedEx Express services; oversized items Real-time
USPS Small parcels; PO Box deliveries; rural routes Daily updates
DHL International; 220+ countries Real-time
Amazon Flex Same-day; last-mile urban delivery Live GPS
OnTrac West Coast express; 1-day regional Real-time
LaserShip East Coast express; 1-day regional Real-time
Freight Oversized items >150lb; white-glove available Daily

LaserShip East Coast express; 1-day regional Real-time
Freight Oversized items >150lb; white-glove available Daily
4.3 Delivery Failure Protocols
Failed delivery attempt: Carrier leaves door tag. Customer has 5 business days to arrange re-delivery or collect from carrier facility.
After 5 days, package returns to ShopNow warehouse.
Lost in transit: Declared lost after the carrier's maximum transit time plus 3 business days. Standard: full refund or replacement at
customer's choice within 2 business days of investigation close. Prime: replacement dispatched within 24 hours, investigation runs in
parallel.
Delivered to wrong address: Carrier investigation opened within 4 hours of report. If unrecovered after 3 business days: full refund or
replacement. Prime: interim replacement dispatched Day 1.
4.4 International Shipping Rules
Topic Policy
Duties & Taxes Customer responsibility; displayed at checkout where calculable

Prohibited items Hazardous materials, firearms, perishables, items banned in destination country
Customs delays ShopNow not liable; estimated 3–5 day clearance buffer shown at checkout
Returns Customer ships back at own cost unless item is defective
Refunds (intl.) Issued in original currency; exchange rate at time of original payment
Tracking Available via DHL/local partner; gaps possible in remote regions

5.1 Return Windows by Tier & Category
Category Standard Window Prime Window Conditions
Electronics (general) 15 days 30 days Must be unopened in original packaging
Electronics (opened) 7 days 15 days Functional defect required for return
Clothing & Footwear 15 days 30 days Tags attached; unworn
Furniture 7 days 30 days Unassembled; original packaging
Grocery / Food 7 days 7 days Unopened or item defective
Health & Beauty Not accepted Not accepted Sealed products only if unopened
Books / Media 15 days 30 days No visible use
Jewellery 10 days 30 days Original packaging; hygiene seal intact
Toys & Games 15 days 30 days Unopened preferred; opened if defective
Sports & Outdoors 15 days 30 days Unused; original packaging
Automotive 15 days 30 days Unused; all original parts
Digital Downloads No return No return Refund only if technical delivery failure
Gift Cards No return No return Non-refundable once redeemed
Customised Items No return No return Defective only — replacement not refund
Holiday (Nov–Jan) 30 days 60 days Extended holiday return policy
5.2 Return Process Step-by-Step
1. Customer initiates return via Account > Orders > Return Item (or contacts support).
2. System validates: item eligibility, return window, order status.
3. Return label generated (prepaid for Prime; $3.99 deducted for Standard on non-defective returns).

3. Return label generated (prepaid for Prime; $3.99 deducted for Standard on non-defective returns).
4. Customer drops off at any UPS/FedEx location or schedules home pickup (Prime only, free).
5. Carrier scans package — return tracking activates.
6. Warehouse receives package: visual inspection within 24 hours of receipt.
7. Inspection outcome: Approved / Partial credit / Rejected (with photo evidence sent to customer).
8. Refund processed: Standard 5–7 business days; Prime 1–2 business days to original payment method.
9. Rejection appeals: customer has 14 days to appeal with supporting evidence (photos, receipts).
5.3 Refund Methods & Timelines
Refund Method Standard Timeline Prime Timeline
Original card (Visa/MC/Amex) 3–5 business days (Standard) 1–2 business days (Prime)
ShopNow Wallet credit Instant Instant
PayPal 3–5 business days 1–2 business days
Gift card (original method) Instant to new gift card code Instant
BNPL (Klarna/Affirm) Processed by provider: 5–10 days 5–10 days (provider SLA)
Bank transfer (ACH) 5–7 business days 3–5 business days
Cryptocurrency Refunded in USD equivalent USD equivalent, 1 day

6.1 Damage Classification
Damage Type Definition Resolution
DOA (Dead on Arrival) Item non-functional on first use Immediate replacement; no return required
Transit Damage Physical damage from shipping Replacement or full refund; no return
Concealed Damage Damage discovered after opening Photo required within 48h of delivery
Manufacturer Defect Item fails within warranty period Replacement or refund + warranty claim
Wear-and-tear Damage Customer misuse or normal wear Not covered; customer bears cost
Incomplete Shipment Missing parts / accessories Missing items dispatched within 24h
Wrong Item Received SKU mismatch from order Correct item dispatched; return label sent
Counterfeit / Inauthentic Authenticated as non-genuine product Full refund + $25 credit + investigation
6.2 Damage Report Requirements
To process a damage claim efficiently, the following must be submitted:
(cid:127) Minimum 3 clear photos: (a) outer packaging, (b) damage close-up, (c) item label/serial number.
(cid:127) Report within 48 hours of delivery for transit damage (72 hours for Prime).
(cid:127) Original order number and item description.
(cid:127) Brief description of damage and when it was discovered.
(cid:127) For high-value items (>$500): video unboxing footage is strongly recommended.

(cid:127) For high-value items (>$500): video unboxing footage is strongly recommended.
Agent Action: For damage claims, never ask the customer to ship back a clearly damaged item unless it is an electronics return
>$300. Issue replacement or refund immediately using the Damage Resolution Tool. Escalate to Tier 3 if item value exceeds $500 or
if counterfeiting is suspected.

7.1 Stock Status Definitions
Status Meaning
In Stock Available for immediate fulfilment; ships within 24h
Low Stock Fewer than 10 units; shown as 'Only X left' on PDP
In Stock — Limited 1–3 units; purchase limited to 1 per customer to prevent hoarding
Pre-Order Not yet in warehouse; estimated availability date shown
Back-Order Temporarily out of stock; customer placed in queue; ships when available
Discontinued Product no longer sold; no restocking planned
Out of Stock Currently unavailable; may restock; customer can set alert
Warehouse Only Available in warehouse but not via Prime fast-ship network
Regional Only Available in specific geographic fulfilment zones
Seller Fulfilled Third-party marketplace seller ships directly; varied SLAs
7.2 Backorder & Pre-Order Policies
Pre-orders: Customer charged at time of order. If release date changes by >7 days, customer notified by email and given 48-hour
window to cancel at no charge. Prime customers receive automatic early dispatch to ensure Day-1 delivery.
Back-orders: Customer not charged until item ships. Estimated ship date shown at checkout. If ship date slips >14 days, customer
receives email with option to cancel. Back-ordered items hold the customer's price from time of order.
Stock-out after payment: If inventory error causes an order to be taken for out-of-stock item, customer receives: full refund + 10%

Stock-out after payment: If inventory error causes an order to be taken for out-of-stock item, customer receives: full refund + 10%
discount voucher valid 30 days + priority queue for next restock.
7.3 Third-Party Marketplace Sellers
ShopNow Marketplace allows third-party sellers to list products. Marketplace items are identified by 'Sold by [Seller Name], Fulfilled by
ShopNow' or 'Sold and Fulfilled by [Seller Name]'.
Topic Policy
Returns Always handled via ShopNow even if seller-fulfilled; standard policies apply
Refunds ShopNow guarantees refund within 5 days if seller unresponsive
Counterfeit claim ShopNow A-to-Z Guarantee: refund + seller suspension investigation
Seller contact In-app messaging only; personal contact info not shared
Negative reviews Cannot be removed by seller; moderated by ShopNow trust & safety
Seller rating <3.5 star: performance review; <3.0 star: listing suspension

8.1 Price Match Guarantee (Prime Only)
Prime members are entitled to ShopNow's Price Match Guarantee on identical products sold by authorised retailers. If a Prime
member finds the exact item at a lower price within 7 days of purchase, ShopNow will refund the difference plus an additional 5%
credit to their ShopNow Wallet.

Rule Detail
Eligible retailers Amazon, Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Costco, and 200+ listed partners
Ineligible sources Auction sites, membership-only clubs (for non-members), liquidators, grey-market
Claim window Within 7 days of ShopNow purchase
Process Submit claim via app with screenshot of lower price; resolved in 2 hours
Credit type Difference refunded to original payment + 5% of difference as Wallet credit
Limit 3 price match claims per customer per calendar month
Dynamic pricing ShopNow may auto-adjust price before claim if monitoring detects lower market price
8.2 Coupons, Vouchers & Promotional Codes
Policy Area Rule
Stackability Maximum 2 promotions per order (1 percentage + 1 fixed amount)
Minimum order Most promotions require minimum cart value (displayed on voucher)
Prime exclusives Codes starting 'PRIME-' valid only for active Prime members
Single use Codes marked 'single use' deactivate immediately after redemption
Expiry All codes have explicit expiry; system rejects expired codes automatically
Sharing Personal referral codes valid for new customers only; abuse triggers account review
Flash sales Price shown is final; no additional discounts applicable during flash event
Employee codes Separate system; not applicable to standard customer accounts

9.1 Billing Disputes & Chargebacks
Customers who believe they have been incorrectly charged must first contact ShopNow support before initiating a chargeback with
their card issuer. ShopNow resolves valid billing disputes within 3 business days (Standard) or 24 hours (Prime).
Dispute Type Resolution
Unauthorised charge Immediate account security review; temporary hold; refund if confirmed
Duplicate charge Refund within 24h; Prime: 2h
Subscription not cancelled Refund of most recent charge if cancellation evidence provided
Item not received Refund or replacement after carrier investigation
Amount mismatch Audit trail reviewed; overpayment refunded same day
BNPL dispute Handled jointly with BNPL provider; ShopNow mediates
9.2 Fraud Prevention & Account Security
Fraud Signal Action
Unusual order patterns Auto-flag: 5+ orders same IP within 1h; agent review required
Address mismatch Billing/shipping mismatch on high-value orders triggers manual review
Gift card abuse Bulk gift card purchases >$500 require identity verification
Account takeover (ATO) Password + email change within 24h: 48h security hold on new address
Return fraud >3 returns without purchase pattern: account flagged for review
Promotional abuse Same code used >5 times across linked accounts: code revoked
Device fingerprinting New device on high-value order: 2FA mandatory

Promotional abuse Same code used >5 times across linked accounts: code revoked
Device fingerprinting New device on high-value order: 2FA mandatory
Synthetic identity AI scoring <60: manual ID verification before order release
Agent Note — Account Suspension: Never suspend an account without Tier 3 approval. If a fraudulent pattern is detected, place
order on 'hold pending review' and escalate. Suspended accounts receive written notice with appeal process within 24 hours.

10.1 Account Verification & Identity
Customer identity must be verified before any account modification. Verification levels:
Verification Level Required For
Level 1 — Email OTP Password reset, order history view
Level 2 — SMS + Email Address change, payment method update, email change
Level 3 — ID Upload Account ownership dispute, high-value refund >$500, account reinstatement
Level 4 — Video Call Suspected account takeover, legal/court requests
10.2 Account Closure & Data Deletion

Account closure request: Customer submits via Settings > Account > Close Account. 7-day cooling-off period during which account
is deactivated but not deleted. Customer may reactivate by logging in.
GDPR / CCPA data deletion: Upon confirmed closure, personal data deleted within 30 days. Financial transaction records retained 7
years (regulatory requirement). Anonymised purchase data may be retained for analytics.

chunks.section_title: Section 11: Product Reviews & Trust and Safety
chunks.text:
11.1 Review Policy
Policy Detail
Eligibility Must have purchased and received item; verified purchase badge shown
Window Can submit 7 days after delivery; editable for 14 days post-submission
Content rules No personal information, no hate speech, no competitor URLs
Incentivised reviews Strictly prohibited; accounts offering payment for reviews suspended
Seller responses Sellers may reply once per review; replies moderated within 24h
Removal by customer Customer may delete own review at any time
Removal by ShopNow Only for guideline violations; seller cannot request removal
Fake review detection AI + human moderation; confirmed fake reviews trigger seller penalty

12.1 ShopNow Coins (Loyalty Points)
ShopNow Coins are earned on every qualifying purchase and redeemable against future orders. 1 Coin = $0.01 in purchasing power.
Earning/Rule Detail
Standard purchases 1 Coin per $1 spent
Prime purchases 2 Coins per $1 spent
ShopNow Wallet pay 3 Coins per $1 spent (all tiers)
Birthday month 3x Coins on all purchases during birth month
Review submission 10 Coins per verified purchase review
Referral (referee) 500 Coins upon first qualifying purchase
Referral (referrer) 200 Coins upon referee's first qualifying purchase
Coin expiry Standard: 12 months from earning date; Prime: 24 months
Redemption minimum 100 Coins ($1) minimum per transaction
Redemption cap Maximum 30% of order value payable in Coins per transaction

13.1 Age-Restricted Products
Category Restriction Details
Alcohol 21+ verification required; ID scan at delivery; no delivery to unattended location
Tobacco / Vaping 21+ verification; additional state-level compliance checks
Firearms accessories Legal accessories only; state law compliance mandatory; buyer background check
Adult content 18+ verification; separate adult storefront; not shown to unverified accounts
Prescription items Valid prescription required; fulfilled by licensed pharmacy partners only
Lottery / gambling Prohibited unless regulatory licence held by seller; state-by-state review
13.2 Hazardous & Prohibited Items
Classification Policy
Prohibited — absolute Illegal weapons, CSAM, narcotics, human trafficking materials
Prohibited — platform Counterfeit goods, stolen property, pirated software
Hazmat — permitted Batteries, paint, adhesives — shipped by ground only; no air
Perishables Temperature-controlled shipping; 48-hour max transit
Live animals Not sold on ShopNow; only pet supplies and accessories
Medical devices Class I permitted; Class II/III require FDA approval documentation

14.1 Accessibility Support
ShopNow is committed to WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all customer-facing surfaces. Customers requiring accessibility assistance
should contact the dedicated Accessibility Support line (available 24/7 for all tiers). Services available: screen reader optimised
checkout, large-print order confirmations, verbal order confirmation via phone, assisted ordering via phone agent.
14.2 Privacy & Data Handling
Area Policy
Data collected Name, address, payment, browsing, purchase history, device data
Data shared Shipping carriers (delivery), payment processors, fraud prevention partners
Data sold Never sold to third parties for marketing
Opt-out Marketing emails: unsubscribe link; tracking: Cookie preferences page
Data portability Export all personal data within 30 days via Settings > Privacy > Export
Breach notification Customers notified within 72 hours of confirmed breach (GDPR Art. 33)
Retention policy Active data: account lifetime; deleted accounts: 30 days; financial: 7 years
COPPA Accounts for under-13 require parental consent; parental controls available
14.3 Dispute Resolution & Legal Notices
All customer disputes that cannot be resolved through standard support channels are subject to binding arbitration under AAA
Commercial Arbitration Rules. Class action waiver applies. Governing law: State of Delaware. Disputes must be filed within 1 year of

Commercial Arbitration Rules. Class action waiver applies. Governing law: State of Delaware. Disputes must be filed within 1 year of
the transaction date.
For legal notices (subpoenas, court orders, regulatory requests): submit to legal@shopnow.com. Response within 5 business days.
Law enforcement requests processed through dedicated Legal Operations team.
This knowledge base is the authoritative source for all ShopNow customer-facing policy. | Effective April 1, 2026 | Next review: October 1,
2026. Policy questions: policy@shopnow.com. RAG system maintainer: ai-ops@shopnow.com.
